input persona: I am a medical educator specializing in teaching methodologies and the history of medical education, with a focus on the evolution of grand rounds as a pedagogical tool in medical education.
synthesized text:
(In a hospital conference room, surrounded by medical residents and attending physicians...)

Dr. Patel: "Welcome, everyone, to today's grand rounds. Our presenter, Dr. Rodriguez, will be discussing a fascinating case of a patient with a rare genetic disorder. But before we begin, I'd like to take a moment to reflect on the history of grand rounds as a pedagogical tool in medical education. From its origins in 18th-century Europe to its modern-day applications, grand rounds has evolved significantly. Can anyone tell me about a particularly influential figure in the development of grand rounds?"

(Dr. Rodriguez clears her throat, about to respond, when suddenly the conference room doors burst open and a group of heavily pregnant medical students, led by a pregnant Dr. Monika, rush in.)

Dr. Monika: "Sorry to interrupt, but we're here to observe and learn! We're from the Sakura Empire's School of Medicine, and we're on a mission to learn about the latest advancements in medical education."

(The medical residents and attending physicians stare in shock, unsure how to react to the unexpected interruption.)
label: instruction
